Who I am

A marketer who
thinks in systems

I’m a final-year Management and Marketing student at Indiana University’s O’Neill School — and I’ve never believed that creativity and analytics are opposites. My career so far has been proof of that.

At Sotheby’s International Realty, I researched and benchmarked luxury campaigns across three continents to position ultra-high-net-worth clients. At PayU, I dug into competitor pricing data and CRM pipelines to sharpen digital payment strategy. I’ve led a menstrual health NGO’s full rebrand on social media. And I built a lifestyle brand to 114K+ followers from scratch.

I’m drawn to roles where brand storytelling, audience psychology, and performance metrics all live in the same room.

Brand Strategy Content Marketing Social Media Growth Competitive Research Campaign Analytics Canva / CapCut Excel & CRM KPI Reporting Audience Targeting Brand Partnerships

Research Report
Synergies Between
Private Banking
& Real Estate
For Primary Market Penetration
An investigative study into the strategic alignment of private banking networks with India’s luxury real estate sector, focused on high-net-worth client acquisition and primary market expansion through Sotheby’s International Realty. Benchmarked U.S., U.K., and EU digital campaigns to deliver actionable UHNI outreach recommendations.

Project 02

Fintech competitive
intelligence & data

Internship Project · 2024
Anahita Tripathi
Data & Competitive Analysis
Competitor Pricing
& Positioning
Report
Digital Payments · India
Built a comprehensive competitor pricing matrix for PayU’s digital payments portfolio, mapping merchant acquisition costs, fee structures, and value propositions across eight rival platforms. The analysis directly informed repositioning recommendations for two of PayU’s core product lines. CRM data accuracy improved by 30% through systematic Excel-based pipeline cleaning.

Also worth noting

Avroh NGO —
social media & rebrand

Social Media & Marketing Manager

From Zephyr to Avroh —
leading a menstrual health NGO’s rebrand

I joined this menstrual health and wellness NGO at a pivotal moment — right as it was transitioning its identity from Zephyr to Avroh. I managed the social media arm of the full rebrand: developing a new content language, visual tone, and posting strategy. From awareness carousels and myth-busting series to campaign collaborations and community education posts, I built the content calendar that helped Avroh establish its new identity on Instagram.
